MODULE: cosmos.core.swarm_heartbeat
FILE: cosmos/core/swarm_heartbeat.py (484 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Swarm Heartbeat - Advanced Health Monitoring System
==============================================================

A sophisticated monitoring system that ensures all swarm components are healthy
and automatically recovers failed services. More than a heartbeat - it's the
nervous system of th

CLASSES:
- ServiceStatus(Enum)
- HealthMetric: Individual health measurement.
- SwarmVitals: Overall swarm health vitals.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- SwarmHeartbeat: Advanced health monitoring system for the Cosmos collective.

Monitors:
- Main w
  Methods: async def check_server_health(self) -> HealthMetric
  Methods: async def check_tmux_sessions(self) -> dict[str, HealthMetric]
  Methods: async def check_ollama_models(self) -> HealthMetric
  Methods: async def check_gpu_health(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def check_evolution_status(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def recover_service(self, service: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def collect_vitals(self) -> SwarmVitals
  Methods: async def save_vitals(self, vitals: SwarmVitals)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_heartbeat() -> SwarmHeartbeat
- async def start_heartbeat(auto_recover: bool=True, check_interval: int=30)
- async def get_current_vitals() -> Optional[SwarmVitals]
